items.title: Italian officials handed jail terms for Genoa bridge disaster that killed 43
items.summary: The ex-head of Italy's motorway operator Giovanni Castellucci was handed a 12-year term over the 2018 bridge collapse.

items.title: Protests in Ukrainian cities against Zelensky's removal of defence minister
items.summary: Ukraine's president has not explained Mykhailo Fedorov's dismissal, which is causing great upset among civil society and the military.

items.summary: Polish security services say the aim was to incite ethnic tensions between Poland and Ukraine.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 四川副省長黃瑞雪猝逝！官方訃告用這4字 前例都「非正常死亡
items.summary: 中國官方今天公布，四川省副省長、公安廳廳長黃瑞雪15日因突發疾病經搶救無效離世，享年54歲。但據報導，大陸網傳黃瑞雪「非正常死亡」。  明報在相關報導中表示，大陸網路今早盛傳黃瑞雪「非正...…

items.title: 伊朗連環襲擊商船！荷姆茲海峽航運陷恐慌 航商通行意願降低
items.summary: 儘管川普堅稱荷姆茲海峽開放，但因伊朗軍隊在聯合國制定的安全航道布設水雷，迫使商船必須改道靠近伊朗或阿曼海岸的替代航線。近來伊朗針對商船的攻擊事件頻傳，航運業界對美國主導的護航路線...…

items.title: 與屍共乘！泰男開車突「背後被碰一下」 轉頭驚見後座躺女屍
items.summary: 泰國北欖府（Samut Prakan）今（16）日凌晨，一名肉販阿伯如常開車前往市場擺攤，一路上未察覺異狀，不料在即時抵達目的地時，驚見後座躺著一具女屍，嚇得他當場連滾帶爬逃出車...…
